ota_ab_provisioning.security: Anti-Rollback protection via TMR Monotonic Counter (active_version)
ota_ab_provisioning.rollback_behavior: Automated fallback to Slot A on Ed25519 signature failure, Anti-Rollback violation, or CRC corruption.

recovery_mode.trigger: Both main slots (A and B) entirely corrupted or missing OR Hardware Recovery Button pressed at boot.

hardware_abstraction.dependency: Zero vendor SDKs. Pure Bare-Metal or ROM bindings.
hardware_abstraction.mocking_strategy: Zero-code modification. GNU Linker (-Wl,--wrap) intercepts HAL calls to inject mock eFuses/Secure Elements from RAM during development.

dev_mode.signature_bypass: Link-time injection of dev_policy.c to --wrap=boot_verify_signature. Forces success without altering production validation code.
dev_mode.recovery_button: Compile-time defined GPIO pin mapped via build_standalone.py. Checked via bare-metal MMIO in the first microsecond of boot.
